welcomeBackTitle: Hello. Welcome to UI Saju Counseling.
welcomeBackDesc: Enter your details to analyze your life.
ceoMottoTitle: A quiet lantern illuminating your life
ceoGreetingContent: Hello. I sincerely thank you for choosing UI Saju at an important crossroads in your life.
ceoMessage1: UI Saju is not simply a place that tells predetermined fate. We combine the deep wisdom of fortune-telling passed down over thousands of years with the most precise AI technology to develop a professional saju consultation platform that provides 'life strategies' uniquely tailored to you.
ceoMessage2: UI Saju trains AI with extensive and sophisticated fortune-telling expertise to provide analysis results that are deeper and more systematic than anywhere else. Rather than a simple list of keywords, we help you understand the vast flow that penetrates your life.
ceoMessage3Title: Your peace of mind is our top priority:
ceoMessage3: Understanding the weight of your concerns better than anyone, UI Saju ensures your privacy completely. You can share your deepest thoughts without even logging in, and all consultations take place safely in a customized space just for you.
ceoMessage4: If you have concerns you haven't shared with anyone, now is the time to borrow the wisdom of UI Saju. We are committed to helping make your tomorrow clearer than today.
guideCard1Title: Three reasons why UI App is better than other apps
guidePrivacyDesc: We thoroughly protect user personal information and privacy. Personal information and privacy provided by users for analysis and consultation are not stored on servers.
guidePrecisionDesc: The AI model is trained with precise saju data extracted from Manseryeok to ensure accurate saju analysis.
guideCustomDesc: We provide customized consultation to be a practical life guide that considers each user's unique situation.
guideBirthTimeOptionalDesc: If you don't know it, leave it blank. Six characters are enough.
guideSolarLunarDesc: If no specific selection is made, analysis defaults to the solar calendar.
guideAnalysisStartDesc: Press the button to start analyzing your fortune.
guideFortune: UI's fortune analysis process and philosophy on fortune
fortunePhilosophy: Destiny is not a predetermined ending, but the direction of the sail we steer.
fortunePhilosophyDesc: Through precise analysis based on Manseryeok and strategic AI interpretation, we present the best strategy to actively navigate your life.
jijiAndJijanganTitle: Branches and Hidden Stems (Earthly Branches/Hidden Stems)
branchAndHiddenText: Branch and Hidden Stems are the roots of saju and where energy is stored. Hidden stems are the heavenly stem energies hidden within earthly branches, representing your inner nature and latent potential.
questionTip1: Provide your birth date/time or MBTI first. The consultation becomes richer.
questionTip2: Asking specific questions makes the consultation more sophisticated.
questionTip3: If you know the other person's birth date/time, accurate compatibility analysis is possible.
privacyNotice: All information used in consultation is automatically deleted when the session ends. Consult with peace of mind.
